title: My name is idi nahui
description: Replaces the sound of the record with the song from the "My name is idi nahui" meme, and also adds Mali's hat
body:
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f86887a45809ad8b10f54d561b7fd45073f2af89.png) ![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30cccc4a0ab3fa0ac4ebe820476ee581e9c61971.jpeg) ## About the resource pack The resource pack is extremely simple, it changes the sound of the C418 - stal record to the song from the meme **[My name is idi nahui](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=48AieXPNnZc)**, and also adds Mali's hat when renaming the **pumpkin** on the anvil.

❗ To work on Forge you need Optifine ❗
❗ To work on Fabric you need ETF, EMF and Cit Resewn ❗

**Mod assistant for renaming items** [**RP Renames**](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames)
RU translate ## О ресурс паке Ресурс пак крайне простой, изменяет звук пластинки **С418 - stal** на песню из мема **[My name is idi nahui](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=48AieXPNnZc)**, а так же добавляет шляпу Мали при переименовании **тыквы** на наковальне.

❗ Для работы на Forge требуется Optifine ❗
❗ Для работы на Fabric требуется ETF, EMF и Cit Resewn ❗

**Мод-помощник для переименования предметов** [**RP Renames**](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames)
|Model|EN|UA|RU|Renamed| |--|--|--|--|--| |![123](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eaed9497b1b03d0662b6b54cf095530de4f7504.png)|Mali hat|Капелюх Малі|Шляпа Мали|![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65240b0f44ff77a02cd1b40e032c3a2deb4a6a0b.png)|
